title: Herpes Simplex
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Oral herpes causes cold sores around the mouth or face.
Genital herpes affects the genitals, buttocks, or anal area and is a separate STI pathway.
Other herpes infections can affect the eyes, skin, or other body parts.
Herpes can be dangerous in newborns or people with weak immune systems.
